content:
flowchart TD
    A[Adult with metabolic syndrome, insulin resistance, or obesity] --> B{Contraindications present?}
    B -->|Yes: pregnancy, eating disorder, T1DM, advanced CKD| C[Do not recommend IF; offer alternatives]
    B -->|No| D{Patient prefers time-structured eating and struggled with continuous caloric restriction?}
    D -->|No| E[Offer Mediterranean-style or structured caloric restriction]
    D -->|Yes| F[Select protocol: 16:8, 5:2, or alternate-day]
    F --> G[Baseline assessment: weight, BP, HbA1c, lipids, electrolytes, renal function]
    G --> H[Initiate IF with scheduled follow-up at 4-12 weeks, then quarterly]
    H --> I{Warning signs: food preoccupation, sarcopenia, hypoglycemia, menstrual irregularity?}
    I -->|Yes| J[Discontinue protocol; reassess]
    I -->|No| K[Continue IF as individualized option [1]]
